history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A mobile screen shows a manga or manhwa title page with a cover image on the left and a synopsis and buttons on the right and lower portion of the screen.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a content page for a story, featuring a square illustrated cover image on the left and a large title and chapter information in the center-left, along with category chips and navigation buttons beneath.

Setting:
The image is an indoor, screen-captured view of a mobile app interface. The top bar shows time-like text on the left and multiple icons on the right, indicating a phone status and app header area.

Visual Details:
The interface has a dark blue and black background with light text in white and gray. In the middle area, the title text “I Was Immediately Mistaken for a Monster Genius Actor” appears prominently in white, with “Chapter 107” below it in smaller text. Under that are a view count line showing “82,2K views” and a star rating indicator showing “9.9 (139)”. A green rounded pill labeled “Ongoing” appears to the right of the rating. Three rounded category buttons appear near the bottom of the central section labeled “Mannwa”, “Comedy”, and “Drama”. At the bottom of the middle area there is a larger horizontal button reading “Lanjut: Chapter 107”. Below that is a thin divider line and a section header “Synopsis”. The synopsis text is in Indonesian and is left-aligned in a paragraph. At the very bottom there is a horizontal banner ad area with colorful graphics and additional text, but only part is clearly readable. The cover image on the left shows an anime-style character with dark hair, wearing a jacket over a light shirt, with a warm light flare effect behind them; large Korean text appears on the cover, but much of it is not fully legible. The layout uses a two-column-like composition: cover image on the left, text and controls on the right/center, and synopsis below.

Visible Text:
22.54
WOLP TV
I Was Immediately Mistaken for a Monster Genius Actor
Chapter 107
82,2K views
9.9 (139)

Mannwa

Lihat Semua
Lanjut: Chapter 107
Synopsis
Suatu hari, seorang warga biasa bernama Kang Woo-jin tiba-tiba mendapatkan kemampuan untuk masuk ke dalam ruang kosong jika melihat naskah atau skenario, dan melalui ruang kosong tersebut, dia bisa menjadi peran itu sendiri. Ketika dia mengikuti teman ke tempat audisi, secara kebetulan dia menunjukkan akting yang dia alami melalui ruang kosong...
HUJAN FREEBET TELAH TIBA!
10JOB GRATIS

Practical Summary:
The image shows a mobile app page for a story titled “I Was Immediately Mistaken for a Monster Genius Actor,” highlighting chapter 107 status as ongoing. It also displays category tags, view and rating information, a synopsis in Indonesian, and a promotional banner near the bottom.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
